# ST-XXX Story Title

Use this template for feature, maintenance, existing-project adoption, and
harness work when the normal story shape is enough.

## Status

planned | in_progress | paused | blocked | implemented | changed | retired

## Lane

tiny | normal | high-risk

## Execution Mode

AFK | HITL

Human needed for:

- Decision, access, review, or approval that may block work.

Ready for agent when:

- Scope, affected files, validation expectations, and stop conditions are clear.

Blocked by:

- Missing input, decision, credential, external access, or unavailable command.
